text:
The goal bearing is +143 degrees, which is far to the right (behind_right or far_right depending on the exact convention, but definitely not forward). The distance is 1819 cm (far).
The previous step resulted in a regression or no progress because I moved forward while the goal was behind/to the side.
The experience states: "When behind_left & far: MOVE_FORWARD → regress... Turn first." and "When behind_left & far: TURN_LEFT → neutral... Good: turning toward goal".
Although my bearing is +143 (right), the principle is the same: if the goal is not in front, turning towards it is necessary before moving forward.
Since the bearing is +143 (positive), I need to turn right to align with the goal.
Action: TURN_RIGHT.
